'''lafofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycoplasmosis|mycoplasmosis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-f-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycoplasmosis|mycoplasmosis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lafofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læfefeth|læfefeth]] || [[word:læfefej|læfefej]] || [[word:læfefesh|læfefesh]] || [[word:læfefe|læfefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lafofofoth|lafofofoth]] || [[word:lafofofoj|lafofofoj]] || [[word:lafofofosh|lafofofosh]] || [[word:lafofofo|lafofofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lafofoth|lafofoth]] || [[word:lafofoj|lafofoj]] || [[word:lafofosh|lafofosh]] || [[word:lafofo|lafofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lafoffoth|lafoffoth]] || [[word:lafoffoj|lafoffoj]] || [[word:lafoffosh|lafoffosh]] || [[word:lafoffof|lafoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lafofotho|lafofotho]] || [[word:lafofojo|lafofojo]] || [[word:lafofosho|lafofosho]] || [[word:lafofoko|lafofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lafofoth|lafofoth]] || [[word:lafofoj|lafofoj]] || [[word:lafofosh|lafofosh]] || [[word:lafofo|lafofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lafofothol|lafofothol]] || [[word:lafofojol|lafofojol]] || [[word:lafofoshol|lafofoshol]] || [[word:lafofokol|lafofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lafofothotho|lafofothotho]] || [[word:lafofojojo|lafofojojo]] || [[word:lafofoshosho|lafofoshosho]] || [[word:lafofoko|lafofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lafofothon|lafofothon]] || [[word:lafofojon|lafofojon]] || [[word:lafofoshon|lafofoshon]] || [[word:lafofokon|lafofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lafofothoro|lafofothoro]] || [[word:lafofojoro|lafofojoro]] || [[word:lafofoshoro|lafofoshoro]] || [[word:lafofokoro|lafofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
